metadata.title: 贴文库 - 安全加密贴文分享
metadata.description: 使用端到端加密安全地分享代码、文本和Markdown。零知识贴文分享，支持过期和阅后即焚选项。

draft.unsavedDraft: 您有一个 {draftAge} 前的未保存草稿

shareSuccess.pasteDescription: 您的贴文已加密并准备分享
shareSuccess.fileDescription: Your files have been encrypted, uploaded, and are ready to share
shareSuccess.mixedDescription: 你的笔记和文件已加密并可分享
shareSuccess.passwordProtectedWarning: This share is password-protected. The recipient will need the password to decrypt it.
shareSuccess.urlWarning: The decryption key is in the URL fragment (#k=...). Anyone with this URL can read this share.

fileShare.uploadDescription: Upload up to {count} files with a combined size of {size}. Files are encrypted in your browser before upload.
fileShare.notConfigured: File sharing is not configured on this server yet. Add S3-compatible storage settings to enable it.
fileShare.emptySelection: Select one or more files to create an encrypted file share.
fileShare.phaseEncryptingHint: Preparing the next encrypted chunk before it leaves your device.
fileShare.phaseUploadingHint: Sending encrypted data to the server.
fileShare.phaseFinalizingHint: Writing the encrypted manifest and finishing the share.
fileShare.stallWarning: Waiting on the current chunk. The upload will continue as soon as the network responds.
fileShare.title: Shared Files
fileShare.description: These files are encrypted end-to-end. Download them with the original link or password.
fileShare.browserDownloadWarning: This browser will buffer downloads in memory. For very large files, Chromium-based browsers with the native save dialog work better.
fileShare.passwordPrompt: This file share is password protected. Enter the password to decrypt the file list.
fileShare.decryptionError: Failed to decrypt file share. Invalid key or corrupted data.
fileShare.notFoundDesc: This file share doesn't exist, is still uploading, or has already been removed.
fileShare.expiredDesc: This file share has expired and is no longer available.
fileShare.tooManyFiles: Too many files selected. The current server limit is {count}.
fileShare.shareTooLarge: This selection exceeds the server limit of {size}.

viewPaste.passwordPrompt: 此贴文受密码保护。请输入密码以解密并查看内容。

errors.pasteNotFoundDesc: 您查找的贴文不存在或已被删除。
errors.pasteBurnedDesc: 此贴文设置为阅后即焚，已被查看过。
errors.pasteExpiredDesc: 此贴文已过期，不再可用。
errors.invalidFormat: 无效的贴文格式或缺少解密密钥
errors.decryptionError: 解密贴文失败。密钥无效或数据损坏。
